prompt: Create a highly realistic candid smartphone photo taken from just outside an open elevator in an ordinary office or public institution building. The scene shows a middle-aged Chinese female department manager standing inside the stainless-steel elevator in side/back profile, looking slightly upward at the elevator floor indicator and control panel. She has an everyday, non-model appearance with natural facial features, realistic skin texture, subtle under-eye tiredness, faint lines, and no cosmetic-surgery or overly polished makeup look. Her dark hair is tied into a practical low bun. She wears a white textured long-sleeve blouse tucked into dark gray flared office trousers, beige low-heeled shoes, and carries a large dark brown patterned tote bag over one shoulder. In one hand she holds a folded black umbrella and a small phone or card. The elevator interior is brushed metal with reflective panels, a vertical button array containing many round buttons, a small black digital display above it, and exactly two visible wall notices: one large blue-bordered Chinese safety notice and one narrower poster to the right. The floor is speckled gray elevator flooring, and the open elevator door frame is visible in the foreground, creating a slightly voyeuristic everyday snapshot composition. Use dim fluorescent indoor lighting, mild motion softness, imperfect framing, realistic reflections, slight grain, and a natural phone-camera perspective. Avoid glamour lighting, studio composition, fashion-model posing, perfect symmetry, AI-smooth skin, or overly beautiful facial features.
promptEn: Create a highly realistic candid smartphone photo taken from just outside an open elevator in an ordinary office or public institution building. The scene shows a middle-aged Chinese female department manager standing inside the stainless-steel elevator in side/back profile, looking slightly upward at the elevator floor indicator and control panel. She has an everyday, non-model appearance with natural facial features, realistic skin texture, subtle under-eye tiredness, faint lines, and no cosmetic-surgery or overly polished makeup look. Her dark hair is tied into a practical low bun. She wears a white textured long-sleeve blouse tucked into dark gray flared office trousers, beige low-heeled shoes, and carries a large dark brown patterned tote bag over one shoulder. In one hand she holds a folded black umbrella and a small phone or card. The elevator interior is brushed metal with reflective panels, a vertical button array containing many round buttons, a small black digital display above it, and exactly two visible wall notices: one large blue-bordered Chinese safety notice and one narrower poster to the right. The floor is speckled gray elevator flooring, and the open elevator door frame is visible in the foreground, creating a slightly voyeuristic everyday snapshot composition. Use dim fluorescent indoor lighting, mild motion softness, imperfect framing, realistic reflections, slight grain, and a natural phone-camera perspective. Avoid glamour lighting, studio composition, fashion-model posing, perfect symmetry, AI-smooth skin, or overly beautiful facial features.
promptZh: 创作一张高度写实的智能手机抓拍照片，拍摄视角位于普通办公楼或公共机构建筑内一扇敞开的电梯外。场景展示了 一位中年中国女性部门经理 侧身/背身站在不锈钢电梯内，微微抬头看向电梯楼层指示器和控制面板。她有着普通人的外貌，非模特长相，面部特征自然，皮肤纹理真实，眼下有细微的疲态和浅浅的皱纹，没有整容痕迹或过度修饰的妆容。深色头发扎成实用的低发髻。她身穿 一件白色质感长袖衬衫，塞进深灰色微喇办公长裤中，脚踩米色低跟鞋，肩上背着 一个大型深棕色花纹托特包。她的一只手拿着一把折叠黑伞和一部小手机或卡片。电梯内部为拉丝金属材质，带有反光面板，垂直排列着许多圆形按钮，上方有一个小型黑色数字显示屏，墙上清晰可见两张告示：一张带有蓝色边框的大型中文安全告示，右侧是一张较窄的海报。地面为灰色斑点电梯地垫，前景可见敞开的电梯门框，营造出一种略带窥视感的日常快照构图。使用昏暗的室内荧光灯照明，带有轻微的运动模糊、不完美的构图、真实的反射、轻微的噪点以及自然的手机拍摄视角。避免使用魅力光效、影棚构图、时尚模特摆拍、完美的对称性、AI 磨皮或过于精致的五官。
